name: Method Classification Review for Non-LLM CR Augmentation Update
summary: Method classifications are coherent and bounded: Lun is back-translation/recombination with BERT scoring, Bonthu is lexical/back-translation/NLPAug text augmentation with sentence-transformer scorers, Krisnawati is teaching-assistant response simulation plus SMOTE, and Li/Haudek/Krajcik is CNN scoring with image augmentation and SMOTE. The records do not classify these as LLM-generated response corpora.

findings.claim_or_issue: Lun et al. fine-tune BERTBASE as the scorer while the synthetic text comes from back-translation and data recombination.
findings.why_it_matters: This prevents misclassifying the study as a generative-LM augmentation paper.
findings.recommended_action: Keep generation_model and scorer_use fields separate in synthesis exports.
